name: analyze_image
description: Analyze an image using a vision-capable model loaded in LM Studio (e.g. qwen2.5-vl). Use for screenshots of bugs, UI mockups, charts, or any visual reference the user attached. Powered by the vision pipeline from PhotoAISorter.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the image, OR an attachment id from the chat.

question.description: What to look for. If empty, returns a general description + classification.

ocr.description: Also extract any text in the image.
